heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear, with a few high clouds in the St. Lawrence and Adirondacks late. Areas of valley fog, mainly east. Lows in the upper 50s to mid 60s, warmest through the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys, mid-50s northeast. Winds diminishing to light and variable, turning to the south from the Green Mountains west, less than 10 mph.

heading: Tuesday
text: Patchy valley fog east burning off to some sun. Thickening clouds, with a rising chance of afternoon showers from the northwest, more likely in the early evening. Quite warm. Highs in the 80s. Winds becoming south to southwest 5 to 15 mph, breeziest in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Showers, possibly some thunderstorms, becoming likely from the Adirondacks, and I-89 north, scattered south. Partial clearing late southwest, otherwise mostly cloudy. Warm and muggy. Lows in the 60s to low 70s. Winds diminishing to light and variable.
